description_long: This is a longboard-style skateboard featuring a slender, elongated deck with a vibrant anime-themed graphic on the underside. The deck artwork depicts a large, detailed illustration of a character with pink hair and expressive eyes, set against a predominantly pink and white background. The skateboard is equipped with four yellow polyurethane wheels and metal trucks, which are mounted in a standard configuration. The top of the deck is covered with a solid black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. The trucks appear robust and are attached with visible hardware, while the wheels are relatively large, suitable for cruising or commuting. The overall design suggests a focus on both aesthetics and smooth urban riding.
description: A longboard skateboard with a pink anime character graphic on the underside, yellow wheels, metal trucks, and solid black grip tape on top.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full anime graphic on the deck, yellow wheels, and metal trucks.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the board's slim, elongated shape and the thickness of the deck.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the solid black grip tape and the placement of the wheels and trucks.
description_view_3: Angled underside view emphasizing the anime artwork, wheel placement, and truck mounting.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: Anime-style illustration of a pink-haired character with large eyes, set against a pink and white background, covering most of the underside of the deck. The style is vibrant and detailed, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_wheel_type: longboard, yellow, large diameter, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: Standard longboard trucks, metallic silver color, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with no visible patterns, cut-outs, or graphics
